creator: bitbucket63-it@yahoo.com
text:
I ran into this dependency issue with science/py-scikit-learn. I cobbled together a port, which I am calling devel/py-threadpoolctl and a patch for science/py-scikit-learn/Makefile. 

It might be that devel is not the proper place for it. But as it stands it seems to be working on my system now.
